en_title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Has Already Earned the Series' Biggest Player Peak on Steam
cn_title: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》Steam峰值创系列纪录
subtitle: 近10万玩家同时在线
opus_summary: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》Steam首发峰值达到99,451名同时在线玩家，超过系列此前所有作品。《刺客信条：影》峰值为64,825人，《刺客信条：奥德赛》为62,069人。

paragraphs.en: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced is off to a strong start on Steam, with around 100,000 concurrent players — more than any other title in the franchise to date.
paragraphs.cn: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》在Steam开局强劲，同时在线玩家接近10万，超过该系列迄今所有其他作品。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft's ground-up remake currently has a launch peak of 99,451 players, making it comfortably the series' best ever launch on Steam.
paragraphs.cn: 这款由育碧从零重制的作品目前首发峰值为99,451人，轻松成为系列在Steam上表现最佳的首发作品。

paragraphs.en: Assassin's Creed Shadows had a launch peak of 64,825 players, while Assassin's Creed Odyssey earned 62,069. Not all games launched on Steam, so comparisons are not entirely straightforward.
paragraphs.cn: 作为对比，《刺客信条：影》的首发峰值为64,825人，《刺客信条：奥德赛》为62,069人。并非所有《刺客信条》作品都在Steam首发，因此比较并不完全直接。

paragraphs.en: No other Assassin's Creed game comes close to Black Flag's early haul, which will likely prove a relief for Ubisoft after years of layoffs, delays, and underwhelming sales.
paragraphs.cn: 没有其他《刺客信条》作品接近《黑旗》如此亮眼的初期成绩。对经历多年裁员、延期和销量不佳的育碧而言，这很可能是一剂强心针。

paragraphs.en: Pre-orders were reportedly 5.39 times higher than those for Shadows. Resynced has already beaten the lifetime sales of Skull & Bones, Ubisoft's costly pirate spinoff from Black Flag.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，本作PC平台预购量是《刺客信条：影》的5.39倍。《黑旗 记忆重置》甚至已超过育碧高成本海盗衍生作《碧海黑帆》的终身销量。

paragraphs.en: IGN's review called it more than just a shinier version of the game players remember, awarding it 9/10.
paragraphs.cn: IGN评测认为，它不只是玩家记忆中那款游戏的画面升级版，而是将系列佳作带到当代标准的重制，并给出9/10分。

translated_terms.Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置
